title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Company Description

We’re ASOS, the online retailer for fashion lovers all
around the world.

We exist to give our customers the confidence to be whoever
they want to be, and that goes for our people too. At ASOS,
you’re free to be your true self without judgement, and
channel your creativity into a platform used by millions.

But how are we showing up? We’re proud members of Inclusive
Companies, are Disability Confident Committed and have
signed the Business in the Community Race at Work Charter
and we placed 8th in the Inclusive Top 50 Companies Employer
list.

Everyone needs some help showing up as their best self. Let
our Talent team know if you need any adjustments throughout
the process in whatever way works best for you.

Job Description

As a Senior AI Engineer, you’ll focus on building and
scaling AI-driven solutions that power personalised
experiences for millions of ASOS customers. You’ll design
and implement robust AI systems leveraging LLMs, generative
AI, and advanced data pipelines, ensuring ethical, secure,
and high-performing solutions.

You’ll collaborate closely with Applied Scientists, ML
Engineers, and Product teams to accelerate delivery and
improve the quality of AI systems by providing reusable
templates, prompt engineering strategies, and infrastructure
that supports experimentation.

What you’ll be doing

- Designing and developing AI solutions using LLMs and
  generative AI, optimising prompts and workflows for high-
  quality outputs.
- Building scalable data pipelines and applying advanced data
  preparation techniques to ensure integrity and quality.
- Driving standardisation and reusability of AI workflows,
  enabling consistency across diverse product domains.
- Implementing MLOps principles for AI systems — including
  CI/CD, model registries, monitoring, and feature
  management.
- Partnering with Cloud Infrastructure teams to design secure,
  cost-efficient environments for AI workloads.
- Embedding data ethics principles into AI development,
  proactively mitigating bias and ensuring safe, responsible
  AI practices.
- Fine-tuning pre-trained models for domain-specific tasks to
  improve performance and relevance.
- Designing and implementing robust evaluation frameworks for
  AI models, including automated testing and benchmarking.

Qualifications

About You

- Professional experience as an AI Engineer or similar role,
  with strong exposure to LLMs and generative AI.
- Solid understanding of the end-to-end AI lifecycle, from
  experimentation through deployment and monitoring.
- Proficiency in Python and familiarity with ML/AI libraries
  (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face).
- Experience with prompt engineering and optimisation for
  generative AI systems.
- Comfortable working with cloud platforms (preferably Azure)
  and containerisation (Docker/Kubernetes).
- Knowledge of MLOps tools and practices such as MLflow, CI/CD
  pipelines, and model monitoring.
- Passionate about ethical AI, bias mitigation, and improving
  developer experience through automation and tooling.
- Experience in fine-tuning large language models and adapting
  them for specific use cases.
- Strong understanding of evaluation methodologies for AI
  systems, including quantitative and qualitative metrics.
- Ability to design automated evaluation pipelines for
  continuous monitoring and improvement of AI models.

Additional Information

BeneFITS’

- Employee discount (hello ASOS discount!)
- ASOS Develops (personal development opportunities across the
  business)
- Employee sample sales
- Access to a huge range of LinkedIn learning materials
- 25 days paid annual leave + an extra celebration day for a
  special moment
- Discretionary bonus scheme
- Private medical care scheme
- Flexible benefits allowance - which you can choose to take
  as extra cash, or use towards other benefits
responsibilities: Designing and developing AI solutions using LLMs and generative AI, optimising prompts and workflows for high-quality outputs
Building scalable data pipelines and applying advanced data preparation techniques to ensure integrity and quality
Driving standardisation and reusability of AI workflows, enabling consistency across diverse product domains
Implementing MLOps principles for AI systems including CI/CD, model registries, monitoring, and feature management
Partnering with Cloud Infrastructure teams to design secure, cost-efficient environments for AI workloads
Embedding data ethics principles into AI development, proactively mitigating bias and ensuring safe, responsible AI practices
Fine-tuning pre-trained models for domain-specific tasks to improve performance and relevance
Designing and implementing robust evaluation frameworks for AI models, including automated testing and benchmarking
use_cases: Personalised fashion experiences for millions of online retail customers
LLM-powered product recommendations and search optimization
Generative AI solutions for fashion content creation and styling advice
Automated evaluation and monitoring of AI model performance in retail context
Ethical AI systems with bias mitigation for fashion recommendations
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on work building AI solutions using
LLMs and generative AI, including prompt engineering, fine-
tuning pre-trained models, and designing evaluation
frameworks. This is direct work on AI systems rather than
supporting infrastructure or platforms for others.
